title: Penalty for violation of Subpart
doc_html:
§787.  Penalty for violation of Subpart

Violation of the provisions of this Subpart constitutes a class two violation.  

Amended by Acts 1981, No. 837, §3.
doc_text:
§787.  Penalty for violation of Subpart
Violation of the provisions of this Subpart constitutes a class two violation.
Amended by Acts 1981, No. 837, §3.
